sourceMovie.title: Daddy's Home 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Daddy's Home 2 (2017) as a comedy theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Daddy's Home 2 clicked for you, Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Daddy's Home 2?
faq.answer: Try Home Alone 2: Lost in New York, Pitch Perfect 2, Elf—each shares DNA with Daddy's Home 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Daddy's Home 2?
faq.answer: Daddy's Home 2 (2017) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Daddy's Home 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Daddy's Home Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
